reforms.description: The 'Career Academy' program was established in high schools to retain students at risk of dropping out, focusing on vocational themes and providing a structured educational environment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing vocational training, the program enhances the skills of students, contributing to a more skilled workforce.
reforms.status_evidence: The program has been established and is operational in high schools.
reforms.importance_rationale: The program significantly impacts student retention and vocational training but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: An example of an apparently successful innovation is the so-called 'Career Academy'. These are special programmes established in a high school... designed to retain students who are viewed as being likely drop-outs.

reforms.description: Charter schools have been created and run independently of local school districts, allowing for innovative educational approaches and increased flexibility in school management.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The flexibility in management and innovative approaches can lead to improved educational outcomes and better prepare students for the workforce.
reforms.status_evidence: Charter schools are operational and functioning independently.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the charter school initiative does not represent a comprehensive overhaul of the education system.
reforms.source_quote: 'Charter schools' are another innovation that appears to be spreading. These are public schools that are created and run independently of local school districts.

reforms.description: The National Competitiveness Act proposes $1.9 billion to strengthen ties between government and industry, including a venture capital provision for joint ventures, alongside a proposed 20 percent increase in technology funding classified as investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing funding for technology and fostering collaboration between government and industry, the proposal aims to enhance innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal has been put forward but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposal represents a significant investment in innovation and collaboration, aiming for systemic change in competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: A so-called National Competitiveness Act is also being debated in the Congress. Its latest version provides $1.9 billion for forging closer ties between the government and industry.
